libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Create an Akka ActorSystem with ConfigFactory.parseString test configuration that binds a test marker interface or message class under akka.actor.serialization-bindings to jackson-json and/or jackson-cbor. Exercise SerializationExtension or JacksonObjectMapperProvider with simple test messages, and terminate the ActorSystem after each test. Avoid relying on Java -parameters support by using public fields or explicit @JsonCreator/@JsonProperty annotations for test message constructors. The optional akka-actor-typed and akka-stream modules are conditionally loaded only when those dependencies are already on the classpath; do not add them unless the test intentionally covers typed ActorRef or StreamRef serialization.
risks: Without serialization-bindings, Akka will not route application messages through the Jackson serializers, so tests may only cover incidental object construction.
Tests that use constructor-only POJOs without @JsonCreator/@JsonProperty may fail depending on compiler parameter metadata.

Optional typed/stream integration classes are present in the artifact but are skipped when akka-actor-typed or akka-stream are absent; this is expected and does not require deterministic setup for core coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is required, but meaningful coverage requires Akka serialization configuration in the generated test rather than plain class instantiation.
